feedback.text: Hi, As an EU citizen, I would like to also see video games be included into this Digital Fairness Act. I myself, own 500+ games, both physically and digitally, which can (and are), currently being taken away from me without any reasoning. There is currently a Initiative running to STOP destroying video games which ends 31/07/2025, with over 1.4 million votes. Simply searching for "Stop destroying games Initiative" should bring you to it's EU petition page. Thank you, and keep it up!
